blocks.text: Bodø/Glimt, 3-1 up, go to Inter — Norway holds its breath
A 3-1 first-leg advantage puts Glimt firmly in control tonight. NRK is already hailing their secret weapon. Survive this and it becomes the greatest result in Norwegian club football history.

blocks.label: ⚽ Wednesday — CL second legs
items: Real Madrid vs Benfica 21:00 — narrow lead, expect a siege
PSG vs Monaco 21:00 — French derby, 3-2 on aggregate
Juventus vs Galatasaray 21:00 — Juve need four goals to survive
